schools.name: The University of Texas School of Law
schools.description: Visit the flagship law school of Texas. Includes a tour of the Tarlton Law Library and a Q&A with the admissions dean.

schools.name: SMU Dedman School of Law
schools.description: Explore SMU's historic campus and learn about their unique legal clinics and business law programs.

schools.name: Baylor Law School
schools.description: Known for its rigorous trial advocacy program, our visit to Baylor provided students with a look at their practice court system.

schools.name: Texas A&M University School of Law
schools.description: A deep dive into Aggie Law's rapidly rising intellectual property and environmental law programs.
